title: RT-PCR for NoV
author: Hengyun Guan

steps_raw.instruction: SuperScript TM III One-Step RT-PCR with Platinum TM Taq By Life Technologies Catalog #: 12574026
Extract total RNA of specimens with the MagNA Pure LC Total Nucleic Acid Isolation Kit (Roche, Mannheim, Germany) according to the manufacturer's instructions.
The primers (G1-SKF/G1-SKR for GI, COG2F/G2SKR for GII) were derived from the studies of Kojima, S. and Shinohara, M. et al. %s %s
The amplification conditions were as follows: 42℃ for 30 min; 95℃ for 15 min, 40 cycles of 95℃ for 30 s, 50℃ for 30 s, and 72℃ for 30 s and a final extension of 72℃ for 10 min.
The expected amplicon size of GI was 330 bp and GII was 387 bp. The yield products were sequenced to validate the the genotype of NoV.
